transcript: Yeah, do you want to, uh, answer a few questions?
Hi, uh… yeah, I need to get a— Ya know, can you help me out a little bit, please?
I’m sorry? What are you looking for?
I’m lookin’ for some, ya know, some marshmallows, ya know?
Yeah, just like two or three ounces, two or three grams—whatever ya got. [exhales] [delay, reverb]
Um… Who is—? Who is this?
[quiet] Percival?Okay, w—? And where are you, you’re in Oregon?
No, no, no, I’m in Santa Cruz, my dear lady. I just really need to—
Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah! I just need 'em up tonight! [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted, reverb]
Oh, well I’m— I’m in Las Vegas, myself.
I—I’m driving right now, ya know, so I can be there, ya know, before ya close. Just help me out!
Um… Our store— Our store closes at eight o’clock.
C’mon I just need some—some marshmallows… baby. C’mon! [exhales]—
Well… I don’t know, we might have Rice Krispies but we don’t have any marshmallows.
C’mon, hook me up! You can do it— You got a… globule up 'ere?! [exhales]
No, we got no gooey things.
You don’t have "too many" things, huh? If I brought—
If I brought my own straw—like a flexible straw—can I just go ahead and dip it into whatever I need?! [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted, reverb]
I don’t know man, you— You have some weird trip you’re goin’ on, huh?
I’m ready to do a transaction, my dear woman!
I don’t know. I don’t know that I have a transaction that’s good for you.
I think we can put something together mathematically and, uh… it’ll jibe just fine if you’re… readin’ my mail on that one? [exhales] Are. You. Readin’ my mail on that one, dear woman? [exhales]
Alright. Why, did you send me an email?
Lemme just dip my straw into whatever I need! [exhales]
Sounds fun, man! I wish I had some of what you’re on! [laughs]
I’ll be there within the hour and we’ll get dippin’—we’ll get dippin’ high ’n low ’n in between! Sound good?
[delay] Alright! I’ll be th—I’ll be there within the hour and we’ll get dippin’—we’ll get dippin’ high ’n low ’n in between! Sound good? [repeats, pitch-up]
[delay, pitch-shifted] I’ll be there within the hour and we’ll get dippin’—we’ll get dippin’ high ’n low ’n in between! Sound good? [repeats]
[delay] Sound good?Alright! I’ll be th—I’ll be there within the hour and we’ll get dippin’—we’ll get dippin’ high ’n low ’n in between! Sound good? [repeats, pitch-up]
There’s a couple meat markets I’ve been meanin’ to try. But I’d love to see what’s goin’ on around here, first off! [sniffs] [exhales]

So—so how—? You wanna tell him, uh…? You wanna say anything for the—for the… 200-odd people who have [unclear] who’ve just watched the movie? They’re super stoked to… to have—to have seen your story and to have heard about you and… [unclear].
[unclear] Market—Goliad. This is Eddie. How may I help you?
You guys got any upchuck up 'ere?
I’m sorry, I can’t hear that. Can you say again, please?
Uh… I need some upchuck tonight. Uh… like a pound or two pounds.
Yeah, are you coming right now?
Yeah, I can be there within, like, two or three minutes. I just wanted to make sure you got it in stock.
Nnn… is that, uh, beef? 'Cause I’m not sure which one you’re looking for, sorry.
Uh… it’s like regurgitation, is what it is.
Here, lemme go to the other room. Uh… it’s a little quieter in there.
Okay. So like I said, I need some upchuck and uh… uh… maybe some saliva? D’you got any o’ that in stock tonight?
What kinda meat is that? Is it pork or beef? Sorry, I’m— I haven’t hear-d that before.
…any lips? D’you got any lips up 'ere? [exhales]
You lookin’ for beef or pork?
Listen, guy, d’you got any upchuck or lips or saliva? It’s a yes-or-no question my—my—my—my man.
Y—yeah, we have some beef. But yes, let me check. If we have, it has to be frozen. I’m not sure, I gotta check it out.
Are you looking for pork or you looking for beef?—
Oh, yeah? D’you mind if I… run my fingers through it here a little bit later?
Yeah, can you—can you please hold? Lemme make sure we have lips.
You’re gonna make sure you have what?
The item you’re looking for. Hold on, let me—
Yes. That’s what you’re looking for, right?
I need li— I need saliva and lips.
Just a second. Lemme check if we have that.
Take care o’ yourself. Take care o’ yourself, alright? Later.
Sorry we’re so rudely interrupted by that meat cretin. [exhales]
So, you get the idea. I just wanna thank everybody for— for being here tonight. It’s fantastic. Very psyched.
It was a hell of a lotta fun putting this together from, ya know, my part, at least. So yeah.
So, LPC, d’you wanna take any questions form the… from the—?
Hey, uh, ya got schnapps up 'ere?
Eh… which one you looking? Schnapps?
Is it possible to get a keg of schnapps, like if I pay extra?
I can’t even hear you. Why don’t you speak up a little bit there?
Hey, if I brought a straw… can I just stick it into whatever I need and try it out and just slurp up what I need or…? [exhales]
[delay, simultaneous]…whatever I need and try it out……slurp up what I need… or?
Would that work? Maybe if I pay extra?
Hey, why don’t you get with the program, guy?
I can’t even hear you! Are you there? Are you guys open for business up 'ere?
Well ho—? How late are you there?
Okay, lemme just come up there and sample what I need, okay? And take a drink of whatever I need. Does that work for you or…?
You come and see… eh… we have. But only… [unclear] be warned.
I’m flying an— I’m gonna land my helicopter right down the street ’n run up 'ere right now. I can be there in… any time ya need.
[unclear] you have to go… um, eh, Walmart and, eh, other big one. Ehm, it’s, eh… Costco. You’ll get everything there.
Can I use your bathroom, please?
You’re— Ah, well you can make an exception for me, can’t ya?
We will have no customers. That’s what I’m talking with you.
How 'bout if I, uh… just take a leak on your floor? How would that sound?
Ehm… Eh… Do this-this thing and then have to call somebody. No problem. [laughs]
Who you gonna call, big man?
"Co— Come and see". I’ll come up there with a hairbrush and brush your hair a little bit. Whadda ya think of that one?
Okay, my customer is coming, one. Thank you.
Okay, yeah. Take care o’ yourself.
So besides all that, what’s shakin’ tonight? [exhales]
That’s really comin’ down out here!
Hey, uh, LPC, do you wanna take any questions?
I’m actually kinda starstruck. Uh… Hi, LPC. One, you’ve changed [breaks up] forever, thank you. Two, um…

…in your life, last two albums, you’ve… changed into having, like, one track with one person for a longer period of time. Thinkin’ of like "Illegalese". Is this a thing you’re try—? Is this, like, what we can expect? Is this what you’re doin’ goin’ forward or is, uh… that just coincidental?
I don’t think I heard the first part. But then you mentioned "Illegalese" where I talked to the lady for a long time?—
…when I… call somebody and they were sitting by the phone waiting to talk to somebody else and then they figure I’m that person, ya know?
And that was fun. It’s always funny.
Ah, no, on that album you had a—a—a couple o’ tracks where you talked to one person for a long time.
Was that a [breaks up] or was that the way it happened to happen? "Illegalese" and with that racist "Florida Flag" guy.
You had a couple of tracks where you talked to… one gu— one person for a longer period o’ time, uh, then what you usually do.
Is that something you’re trying that’s new or is, like, just the way it happened to happen or is this, like, a new thing we’re shifting into or was that just a—a happy coincidence?

Honestly, I don’t know if—if you’ll buy this, but I think it’s really kind of inherent in putting out a CD. Like back when I made cassettes all the time, there was so little… like, delineation between one thing and another thing. It just kind of all bled into the next thing to where it was hard to even pinpoint where something happened. But with CDs and stuff you really have to, um… find… the beginning and the end and…Yeah, if it sounds good, I’m gonna go for it, I’m gonna include it. I guess it has gotten a little more long-form, to answer your question. So, yeah, things have gotten a lot more long-form, now that I think about.There used to be just, like… 50 or 60, ya know, 3-second, 5-second, 10-second things and, uh… that’s kind of gone out a little bit with the digital stuff.
Cool! Well thank you very much!
Hi, uh, d’you have any pie?
Um, yeah, but we close in… like five minutes.
I’m running down the street right now.
Yeah, what kind? Apple? We only have apple pie.
Um, no, we only have apple pie.
I’ll take a cherry and I’ll take a blueberry. Does that sound good or…?
Uh, we only have apple pie, sorry.
Um… banana cream… or key lime?
We do have one more… one more question.

I feel like, uh… your older albums are a bit more casual and you’re not really as, uh, aggressive in how you talk to people. But in the newer ones, you’re far more forceful. I was wondering if you do that on purpose or something just changed?

No, ya know, I was a teenager, ya know? I hadn’t— [clears throat] I had never left the state o’ Colorado… I was usually on restriction—grounded—my parents would not want me to go do anything 'cause I was pretty outta control at that time. [sniffs]So now, I don’t know. Ya know, I’m always getting older and changing and growing. And sometimes, to be perfectly honest with you, it seems like I didn’t set it up right, so I have to yell for them to hear me and… I didn’t even realize I was yelling until… [laughs] ’til afterwards. I was like, Oh, I was yelling at that guy. So yeah.
Little bit of everything in there, probably.
Well thank you. It’s been great. Um…

This year! Gosh, I’m— I’m really trying to have it be this year. It’s a lotta work, as you… can understand. And I’m just trying and it’s underway and it’s Longmont 16 and it’s gonna be, uh… It’s gonna be this—this year sometime. Yeah.
[delay]…underway and it’s Longmont 16 and it’s gonna be, uh…
I will definitely keep you posted.—
Hey, LPC, can you do one more call for… uh, for the audience?
Hey, yeah, um… I wanted to get somethin’ that’s prismatic. Maybe cylindrical?—
I need, like, a chamber, ya know what I mean?
Yeah, uh… so for like smoking, a… dry rub or something?
Yeah, I need to get real prismatic and real spherical real soon.
Oh, yeah, big time, big time.—
We do have, like, pipes and stuff here.
Big time, big time. You know what I mean, yeah.
[delay]Big time, big time. You know what I mean, yeah.
Uh, so let’s see. What do you got as far as, like, a marshmallow, you know what I’m sayin’?
I… don’t know. What is a "marshmallow"?
You know, just—just some, uh… Just some globules tonight. You know what I mean. [exhales] Maybe after hours. Oh, yeah!
Kemosabe said I could hit ya up! Uh, hello! Ya with me?
